adversarial.description: Beyond re-running all 13 contract verifications to EXIT:0: (RELEASE INVARIANTS) E09 asserts NO v0.8.0 git tag exists -- the pipeline never self-tags; E08 asserts the release-readiness checklist holds items 7 (sign-off) + 8 (tag) at the exact pinned literal 'PENDING -- human-gated (H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE)' while items 1-6 each carry an evidence citation, so the human gate cannot be silently pre-satisfied. (C10 LOCKSTEP) E05 proves the guide's meta AND footer version anchors both equal NIZAM.json framework.version 0.8.0 -- a half-done bump (manifest without the guide, or vice versa) would fail C10 and this check. (STRICT INCREASE) E04/E06 assert 0.7.0->0.8.0 is a strict semver tuple increase for both NIZAM.json and CONTEXT.md, not a string edit. (COUNT SYNC LOAD-BEARING) E12 asserts the stale 'all 13 checks (C1-C13)'/'checks C1-C10' phrases are GONE and C1-C15 + the C14/C15 rows are present, so the sync is complete not partial. (CONFINEMENT) E11 pins the non-.agent diff to exactly the 7 contracted files; E01 anti-vacuity confirms none of the post-conditions held at the base 707a3f5.
adversarial.process_note: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. Per 06_release_train.md Sec 6 the release mechanics (changelog roll-up, date stamp, tag) require no Generator contract; the phase applied its adversarial-verification discipline anyway. The operator authorization ('Rebase line to fit the objective. You are approved to proceed.') and the Section-9 re-baseline were recorded in run_state BEFORE implementation (coordination commit 67a0be3), per the gate-decision-before-acting rule (NDEBT-018.2 / ecosystem/01 4.1). Anti-vacuity (E01) and confinement (E11) anchor to the phase base 707a3f5 (the F-058 merge, PR #37).

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: .agent/evidence/059/diff.patch is `git diff 707a3f5..HEAD` at the deliverable commit b79b263; E11 independently re-asserts the non-.agent changes are exactly the 7 contracted files.
evidence_bundle_check.flat_files: 13 per-entry captures 059-verify-01..13.txt + 059/verification.txt (13 EXIT:0) + 059/diff.patch + the 045-pattern release-readiness checklist.

acceptance_reconciliation.summary: Acceptance test 1 -- 'release-readiness checklist items 1-6 carry evidence paths; items 7-8 held at the pinned PENDING literal until the operator executes them' -- maps to E08 (checklist structure: 1-6 evidenced, 7-8 the exact PENDING literal). Acceptance test 2 -- 'both sweeps green with exit codes asserted; no v0.8.0 tag exists at close (the pipeline never self-tags)' -- maps to E10 (sweep 15/15 + payload 11/11 + self-test + e2e, each rc asserted) and E09 (no-self-tag invariant). The version/CHANGELOG/README/count-sync deliverable is framed by E02-E07, E11-E13; E01 anti-vacuity anchors the lot.

non_blocking_observations: OPERATOR RE-BASELINE (deliberate): the operator authorized 'Rebase line to fit the objective. You are approved to proceed.', recorded as a Section-9 scope-budget re-baseline original_estimate_lines 2300->2600 (130% ceiling 2990->3380) in coordination 67a0be3. This resolves the tight-headroom CUMULATIVE WATCH feature 058 flagged for 059. Actual came in at 62 non-.agent lines (well under both the old ~219 headroom and the estimate), so the phase closes at 2833/3380 (83.8%) with wide margin.

TWO-PART RELEASE GATE (not self-executed): 'You are approved to proceed' authorized PREPARING the package, not the H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE sign-off. Checklist items 7 (sign-off) + 8 (annotated tag v0.8.0 at the merge commit) remain the operator's, matching the v0.7.0 precedent (operator 'I Sign off release-readiness' at 31f3fff, then operator-pushed tag at 4833322). Phase 006 is implementation-complete but not release-closed.

DEFERRED POST-RELEASE REFRESH (045 precedent): the ROADMAP Current-Position / phase-006-COMPLETE narrative and any DEBT phase-close roll are deferred to a post-v0.8.0 refresh, exactly as feature 045 deferred them to commit 27f28c3. The phase-close is carried here by run_state (feature_complete 059 + this ledger) + feature_list, not a doc rewrite -- keeping 059 prepare-only.

CODERABBIT REVIEW ROUND (PR #38, Run 462469f8): 2 valid doc-honesty findings fixed within 059's own new docs (C14 row now notes the local ./ /../ exemption; C15 row reworded from 'each map to a role' to the accurate coverage/tie-together framing -- it does not detect a swapped mapping), matching 058's already-accurate 'correspondence' language. 1 finding declined with precedent (README v0.8.0 re-pin is the prepare-then-tag pattern used for v0.6.0/v0.7.0; the operator tags at merge). No check behaviour changed; sweep 15/15 and all 13 verifications re-run green; footprint unchanged at 62.

final_verdict.summary: Feature 059 APPROVED. All 13 contract verifications re-run to EXIT:0. The prepare-only v0.8.0 MINOR release package is complete on the feature-045 pattern: version surfaces bumped 0.7.0->0.8.0 in C10 lockstep, README re-pinned, CHANGELOG rolled to [0.8.0] - 2026-07-20 (MINOR; blocking_findings narrowing disclosed minor-not-breaking), check-count synced 12->15 (C1-C15), and a SHA-pinned release-readiness checklist emitted with items 7-8 held PENDING for the operator. Sweep 15/15, payload 11/11, self-test 47/47, e2e green; no v0.8.0 tag (no-self-tag invariant). SCOPE: 62 vs 110 (UNDER); cumulative 2833/3380 (83.8%) after the operator-authorized re-baseline. Phase 006 (features 049-059) is implementation-complete and awaits ONLY the operator's H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE execution to close.
